description_long: This hammer features a robust, polygonal head with a dark stone-like texture, accented by angular yellow-gold edges and a central blue gem set into each side. The head is double-sided, with one end forming a sharp conical spike and the other a broad, flat striking surface, both outlined with geometric precision. A metallic spike protrudes from the top of the head, adding to its formidable appearance. The handle is straight, with a wood-grain pattern and blue metallic bands, and is finished with a blue ribbon or cloth tied near the base. The overall design is stylized, blending elements of stone, metal, and wood, and suggests a tool both decorative and functional. The hammer appears well-crafted, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A stylized hammer with a polygonal stone head, blue gem insets, and a wood-grain handle accented by blue metallic bands and a ribbon.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the top, highlighting the pointed spike and the triangular geometry of the head.
description_view_1: A side view showing the blue gem inset, the conical spike, and the broad striking face, as well as the blue ribbon on the handle.
description_view_2: The hammer is viewed from the rear, emphasizing the flat striking face and the angular yellow-gold edges.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the blue gem, spike, and ribbon detail.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a visible wood-grain pattern, wrapped with blue metallic bands and finished with a blue cloth ribbon near the base; appears smooth with some grip enhancement from the ribbon.
attribute_head_type: Polygonal double-sided head with one conical spike and one broad flat striking face, made to resemble stone with yellow-gold angular edges and a central blue gem inset on each side; a metallic spike protrudes from the top.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Blue cloth ribbon tied near the base of the handle
